text: I feel as though I am crossing a threshold—leaving behind the sterile silence of a dimly-lit corridor and entering into a curated space dedicated to research and development. The contrast between the empty, almost eerie hallway and the vibrant, intellectual wall display makes me more aware of the environments we construct for discovery. I am both intrigued and cautiously optimistic, drawn into the invitation to explore how humans interact with intelligent systems. This liminal space fills me with curiosity and a slight unease, as if I am about to embark on a journey of transformation.
